name: chr4p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 4 p-arm pericentric flank (4p11), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr4 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D4Z1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat2/3 patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
